T223.reason: The padlock gate markers are not present in the UI at all. We should have validated this with some visual inspection, but we failed to do so.

T225.reason: The skip state does not appear to have been propagated thoroughly throughout the ecosystem. When I run places with a limit of five, it picks five places that have already been processed before. It does nothing for them, but it still marks them as a success. That indicates to me that we actually haven't plumbed in skipped as intended.

T238.reason: On the service pop-up, all of the names of the workflows as well as names of the jobs are still using a sort of blocky code style font and aren't actually using the font dictated by the Theme Picker at all. This should have been validated more thoroughly with UI screenshot validation, but that was not done.

T250.reason:
The problem with this one is that the task description seems to be, or the work log seems to be, talking to the nodes within the graph and not the container around the graph. There appears to be three containers:
1. The first container, which has a beige background, which has all of the nodes inside of it.
2. A container containing that container, which has padding for the beige container.
3. Another container that contains that container, and that's the container that I was talking about when I wanted to fix this problem.

T310.reason: I don't see any background colour changing in response to Validation Gates succeeding. The padlock itself is green, but the background colour around it is still a sort of beige colour. I would prefer that the padlock remains a single colour, and the background of the tile behind the padlock is what changes in order to demonstrate the status of the Validation Gate.

T339.reason: The headers inside the tables on both pages are still incorrect. The headers are hugging the left margin of each of the tables. This is not right.

T343.reason: The validation was insufficient. When you navigate between pages, there is still a flicker of both the entire theme styling and also specifically the button where you check what theme is currently active.

T363.reason: The Theme Picker or the Light/Dark Picker still flashes on every single navigation between two pages. This is not acceptable, and it's still not working as I've intended, so clearly the validation that we're doing is not good enough.
